metadata.description: Personal marketplace hosting the llm-wiki plugin (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin).

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern as a Claude Code plugin. Bootstrap, maintain, query, research, lint, and safely delete plain-markdown personal knowledge bases. Eight slash commands (/llm-wiki:init, /llm-wiki:ingest, /llm-wiki:query, /llm-wiki:research, /llm-wiki:lint, /llm-wiki:list, /llm-wiki:sources, /llm-wiki:rm) and one auto-loading skill. New in v0.4.5: /llm-wiki:research filters out 1-star (off-topic) candidates from the numbered selection list — only ≥2-star candidates are shown, with a one-line summary of how many were filtered out. v0.4.4: /llm-wiki:sources prints a table of all ingested sources in the active vault. v0.4.3: PDF ingest prefers marker-pdf when installed. v0.4.2: skill auto-manages the optional qmd collection lifecycle. v0.4.1: /llm-wiki:init confirms the resolved path before scaffolding when a bare name is given. v0.4.0: /llm-wiki:rm safely deletes vaults; ingest detects purpose drift; lint checks for purpose drift. Obsidian is the reading IDE; Claude does the maintenance.
